parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
class App {
  + main()
  + start()
}

class FileHandler {
  promptFile():String
  writeListToFile():void
  readListFromFile():ArrayList<String>
}

class item {
  - LocalDate dueDate
  - String desc
  + getDesc()
  + getDate()
  + setDesc()
  + setDate()
}

class HomeScreenController {
  - ObservableList<OL> Lists
  + viewListsClicked()
  + listClicked(nameOfList,mode)
  + addBlankListClicked()
  + addExistingListClicked()
  + editListClicked()
  + saveAllListsClicked()
  + confirmDeleteClicked()
}

class ListScreenController {
  - ObservableList currentList
  + filterBoxChanged()
  + saveToStorage()
  + addNewItemClicked()
  + deleteSelectedClicked()
  + completeBoxChanged(item)
  + itemDescChanged(item)
  + itemDueDateChanged(item)
  + itemSelected(item)
}

App -- HomeScreenController
App -- ListScreenController
FileHandler --o HomeScreenController
FileHandler --o ListScreenController
item --o HomeScreenController
item --o ListScreenController
@enduml
```
